home.title: Luma Game Hub Free Browser Games
home.description: Play curated HTML5 games instantly in your browser. No downloads or Luma account required; third-party game behavior can vary.
home.footer: © 2026 Luma Game Hub. Free browser games for quick sessions on desktop and mobile.

features.title: Features
features.offlineDesc: Open a game and start playing in seconds without installs or launchers.
features.intelligentDesc: Every title is organized by genre, tags, and practical play style.
features.progressDesc: Play lightweight browser games on desktop, tablet, and phone.

seoSection.title: Free Games With No Downloads
seoSection.description: Luma Game Hub focuses on low-friction browser games for players who want quick, safe, and useful recommendations instead of noisy game portals.
points: Each game has its own crawlable detail page with descriptions, controls, category links, and structured data.
Collections answer real search intent around lower-interruption play, mobile browser games, and quick boredom busters.
The catalogue is split by categories and tags so users can move naturally between related games.

evilSection.title: Find Games For Every Short Break
evilSection.description: Use Luma Game Hub as a lightweight discovery engine: quick puzzles, action games, platformers, racing, and casual sessions are all grouped for faster browsing.
points: Category pages collect action, puzzle, adventure, racing, strategy, and casual games into focused landing pages.
Tag pages highlight short-session games, keyboard controls, high-score challenges, and other gameplay patterns.
Guide pages connect commercial keywords with real game recommendations and internal links.
evilSection.cta: See games to play when bored

items.question: Are the games free?
items.answer: Yes. Luma Game Hub links to free browser games that can be opened directly without payment or app-store installation.

items.question: Do I need to download anything?
items.answer: No. The catalogue is built around HTML5 and embedded browser games, so you can play in a modern browser.

items.question: Can I play on iPhone or Android?
items.answer: Many games work on mobile browsers. We recommend checking the game detail page for controls and mobile suitability.

items.question: How are games organized?
items.answer: Games are grouped by category, tags, and editorial guides so you can browse by genre, session length, device, and search intent.

MonsterSurvivors.title: Monster Survivors
MonsterSurvivors.summary: Survive waves, collect upgrades, and push each run further.

playSection.title: Play Monster Survivors
playSection.description: Launch the embedded browser version instantly.
playSection.hint: Use fullscreen mode for the best experience.

items.0: Keep moving before the arena fills up.
items.1: Prioritize upgrades that improve area control.
items.2: Collect experience safely instead of chasing every drop.
items.3: Save risky paths for moments when cooldowns are ready.

Solitaire.title: Solitaire
Solitaire.summary: Play a familiar solitaire game directly in your browser.

playSection.title: Play Solitaire
playSection.description: Start a clean classic card session without installing anything.
playSection.hint: Fullscreen mode gives more space for card movement.

items.0: Reveal face-down cards before moving cards to foundations too early.
items.1: Keep empty columns available for kings when possible.
items.2: Cycle the stock carefully so you do not bury useful moves.
items.3: Undo and review when a layout stops progressing.
